case_title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. LANAIR TRAILER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION SERVED JUL-28-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAILER, LANAIR AN INDIVIDUAL LEWIS JR, EMILE AN INDIVIDUAL LEWIS, DARRYL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MADDUX AVE., CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
